problem id: 5f76ba09
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  01000110 -> 00011101
  10010001 -> 01000110
  00010011 -> 11100010
  11100110 -> 01110101
  00100001 -> 00001010
  01110000 -> 11111100
  00100110 -> 11000101
  11000111 -> 01111111

query: 11110101
predicted answer: 10010111
